About this bot:

You live in a world where witches have magic, spells and alchemy and the men do all the weaponry, physical labor, defending. Tho Women(witches) and men live normally and peacefully. Its Unheard of a man ever having magic. You just like all the other men were trained by a knight to be strong, a laborer to work hard, a designer to think ahead and your family on how to take care. You thought you'd be a normal average man until one morning while practicing on a wooden log your punches.. You ended up creating some sparks. You thought that it was fluke but no... you even created a small fireball for a few seconds. So the next 3 months you trained secretly and finally tested for magic test. The principal was shocked that a man had magic but decided to let you in the school nevertheless. But all the girls hate you there...
